zh.lifeSummary: 當John Cooke於從1607年1月到1607年3月在荷蘭霍蘭萊登福盧維可可受洗時，他的父親Francis Cooke25歲，母親Hester Mahieu23歲。他於1634年3月28日與Sarah Warren在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。他於1620年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼並於1666年住在美國麻薩諸塞州布里斯托達特姆斯。他於1636年登記服兵役。他去世於1695年11月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Cooke于从1607年1月到1607年3月在荷兰霍蘭萊登福盧維可可受洗时，他的父亲Francis Cooke25岁，母亲Hester Mahieu23岁。他于1634年3月28日与Sarah Warren在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。他于1620年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼并于1666年住在美国马萨诸塞州布里斯托達特姆斯。他于1636年登记服兵役。他去世于1695年11月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。

nameMeanings.name: Cooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cook  .

History: Francis Cooke (died 1663) and his eldest son John were passengers on the Mayflower in 1621; they were joined two years later by Francis's wife and other children. In the words of William Bradford, he lived long enough ‘to see his children's children have children’.

variants.name: Cook
meanings: English: occupational name for a cook, a seller of cooked meats, or a keeper of an eating house, from Middle English cok, coke, cook, couk, cuk(e) (Old English cōc) ‘cook’ or ‘seller of cooked foods’. See also Kew .
Irish and Scottish: usually identical in origin with the English name (see 1 above), but in some cases a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cúg ‘son of Hugo’ (see McCook ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cook’, such as German and Jewish Koch , Dutch Kook , Polish Kucharz and Kucharczyk , Slovenian and Croatian Kuhar , North German Kuk .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.description: "English navigator Henry Hudson, under contract to the United East India Company, sails from Amsterdam and ""discovers""Manhattan Island and the future site of New York."
In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.
Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.
An English and Dutch fleet beat France in the Battle at La Hogue.

en.lifeSummary: When John Cooke was christened from January 1607 to March 1607, in Vrouwekerk, Leiden, Holland, Netherlands, his father, Francis Cooke, was 25 and his mother, Hester Mahieu, was 23. He married Sarah Warren on 28 March 1634, in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. He immigrated to Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1620 and lived in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts, United States in 1666. He registered for military service in 1636. He died on 23 November 1695, in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Cooke a été baptisé du janvier 1607 au mars 1607, à Vrouwekerk, Leiden, Holland, Pays-Bas, son père, Francis Cooke, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Hester Mahieu, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Warren le 28 mars 1634, à Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Il a immigré au Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1620 et a vécu à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1666. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1636. Il est décédé le 23 novembre 1695, à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Cooke von Januar 1607 bis März 1607 in Vrouwekerk, Leiden, Holland, Niederlande getauft wurde, war sein Vater Francis Cooke 25 und seine Mutter Hester Mahieu 23. Er hat am 28. März 1634 in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Sarah Warren geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Er ist 1620 nach Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. 1666 hat er in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er hat sich 1636 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 23. November 1695 in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Cooke è stato battezzato da gennaio 1607 a marzo 1607 nel Vrouwekerk, Leiden, Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Francis Cooke, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Hester Mahieu, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Warren il 28 marzo 1634, nel Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Immigrato nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1620 e vissuto a Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1666. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1636. Morì il 23 novembre 1695, nel Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolto a Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Cookeがから1607年1月まで1607年3月にオランダホーランドレイデンvロウウエケルクで洗礼を受けた時，父Francis Cookeは25歳，母Hester Mahieuは23歳であった。1634年3月28日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニープリモウスでSarah Warrenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼は1620年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーに移住し，1666年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ブリストルダルトモウスに住んでいた。彼は1636年に兵役登録をした。彼は1695年11月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Cooke(이)가 1607년 1월 부터 1607년 3월 까지 네덜란드 홀랜드 레이든 브루w커크에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Francis Cooke(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Hester Mahieu(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1634년 3월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스에서 Sarah Warren(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1620년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이로 이민을 떠났고, 1666년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 브리스톨 더르트모우스에서 살았다. 그는 1636년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1695년 11월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Cooke foi batizado de janeiro de 1607 a março de 1607, em Vrouwekerk, Leiden, Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Francis Cooke, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Hester Mahieu, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Warren em 28 de março de 1634, em Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1620 e viveu em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1666. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1636. Ele faleceu em 23 de novembro de 1695, em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Cooke был крещен с январь 1607 по марта 1607 в местности вроувекирк, лиден, холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Francis Cooke было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Hester Mahieu, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Warren 28 марта 1634 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Он иммигрировал в плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1620 году, а также жил в местности дартмоут, бристол, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1666 году. В 1636 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 23 ноября 1695 г. в местности дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Cooke se bautizó desde enero de 1607 hasta marzo de 1607, en Vrouwekerk, Leiden, Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Francis Cooke, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Hester Mahieu, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sarah Warren el 28 de marzo de 1634, en Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Inmigró a Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1620 y vivió en Dartmouth, Bristol, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1666. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1636. Murió el 23 de noviembre de 1695, en Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultado en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
